form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.01) at this track in a Free For All, finishing fourth and beaten 7 lengths. Has six successes and 11 minors from 25 starts from box 1. Looks a leading chance.

form.formComment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting three wins back-to-back. Had plenty of support last start when she won by one length at this track (29.94) beating Javen's Shot in a Grade 4/5 on April 12. On a hot winning streak and likely to score again.
